aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement with targeted optimizations.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with relevant HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-rated but missing key elements like listed hours and regular posts.
critical_issues: No regular posts or Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and conversational content makes the site less attractive to AI crawlers.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC services in Eden Prairie' where AI assistants prefer sites with structured data.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, licenses, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI assistants to overlook your business.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach includes implementing schema markup, creating FAQ content, and optimizing your GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors who optimize for AI are already capturing your potential market share. Act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for your HVAC business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your business stand out to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and drive more leads.
